title: Long-term effects of maternal deprivation on cholinergic system in rat brain.
ehr_evidence: The study uses an animal model (Wistar rats) and laboratory measurements, not electronic health records.
summary: The study investigates the long-term effects of maternal deprivation (MD) on the cholinergic system in the brains of Wistar rats, specifically measuring acetylcholinesterase (AChE) activity and cholinergic fiber density in the hippocampus and retrosplenial (RS) cortex.
key_findings: Significant decrease of AChE activity in the cortex and increase in the hippocampus of MD rats.
Density of cholinergic fibers significantly increased in CA1 region of hippocampus and decreased in RS cortex.
